scripts.dev: concurrently --names "DB,BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan,green" --kill-others-on-fail "npm run db:up" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.db:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
